subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Abhá Beauty! I cherish the hope that thou mayest, day by day, advance in spiritual degrees [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی امیدوارم که روز بروز در مراتب روحانیه ترقی نماای
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
